---
title: "The 4D Camera – An 87 kHz Frame-rate Detector for Counted 4D-STEM Experiments"
type: "article"
author: "P. Ercius, I. Johnson, H. Brown, P. Pelz, S. Hsu, B. Draney, E. Fong, A. Goldschmidt, J. Joseph, J. Lee, J. Ciston, C. Ophus, M. Scott, A. Selvarajan, D. Paul, D. Skinner, M. Hanwell, C. Harris, P. Avery, T. Stezelberger, C. Tindall, R. Ramesh, A. Minor, P. Denes"
year: "2020"
publication: "Microscopy and Microanalysis 26, 1896-1897"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1017/s1431927620019753"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - electron microscopy
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 37
fwci: 7.23
citation_percentile: 97.1
is_top_10_percent: true
is_oa: true
oa_status: bronze
counts_by_year:
  - [2018, 0]
  - [2019, 0]
  - [2020, 0]
  - [2021, 14]
  - [2022, 13]
  - [2023, 5]
  - [2024, 3]
  - [2025, 2]
keywords:
  - "Detector"
metrics_updated: "2026-05-02T16:35:20Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> The 4D Camera – An 87 kHz Frame-rate Detector for Counted 4D-STEM Experiments
P. Ercius, I. Johnson, H. Brown, P. Pelz, S. Hsu, B. Draney, E. Fong, A. Goldschmidt, J. Joseph, J. Lee, J. Ciston, C. Ophus, M. Scott, A. Selvarajan, D. Paul, D. Skinner, M. Hanwell, C. Harris, P. Avery, T. Stezelberger, C. Tindall, R. Ramesh, A. Minor, P. Denes
Microscopy and Microanalysis 26, 1896-1897


## Abstract

,
